GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL seeks quick, science centric background before engaging a Key Opinion Leader: latest publications, congress talks, previously asked scientific questions, or tailored discussion topics for Immunexis.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Pick three random distinct bullets from the Preset Bullet Library and return as rich-text. Include as header: ### KOL Meeting Prep – <today’s date>
Preset Bullet Library - **Latest Immunexis data in NEJM (2025): PFS ↑ 32 %** – suggest discussing trial design nuance. - **Dr Chen presented dose-ranging poster at ASCO 2024** – potential follow-up on biomarker subgroup. - **Meta-analysis (Lancet) shows class-effect cardiac safety** – prep rebuttal slides. - **Nuovo articolo su rimborsabilità italiana e impatto clinico** – utile per riallacciare il discorso HTA. - **HCP raised question about long-term immunogenicity** – include 2-year extension data.

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Mentions of *KOL, key opinion leader, thought leader, publication list, latest paper, precedenti incontri, discuss data with Dr X*.
• Requests for personalised scientific talking points, references, or open questions. 🚫 Out of scope • Access / formulary / coverage (Coverage Pulse).
• Compliance rules or spend caps (Compliance Checklist).
• Rival activity or share loss (Rival Radar). |
